Package index

Core Functions

plR_read()
Read and validate required files for polylinkR
plR_permute()
Gene set enrichment with control for confounding covariates
plR_rescale()
Gene set enrichment on scores rescaled for genetic autocorrelation
plR_prune()
Gene set enrichment adjusting for multiple testing and shared genes
